violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Large can opener blade has debris on it.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Fan in the kitchen and fans in the walk in cooler have dust buildup.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dusty ceiling vents in the dish washing area.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
